free_text: Nuclear reactions of medium and heavy target nuclei
with high-energy projectiles. Spallation of Mn-55,
Co-59, Ni-natural and Cu-natural by 3.65 A*GeV C-12
Each target consisted of three foils - the outer ones
were used for recoil loss compensation, the central
foil was analysed. The target foils enclosed in Mylar
catchers 17.5 mg/cm2 thick were preceded on the
upstream side by a 19.5 mg/cm2 aluminum foil
surrounded by Al guard foils of the same thickness.
The systematic uncertainties due to the
The uncertainty associated with the cross
sections refers to counting statistics, detector
efficiencies of gamma rays and target thickness.
Lower case, elem/mass was transformed for
Correction was made according to M.Bossant
